description: Unified card lookup table for bot AI - merges winrates, LLM evals, and card metadata

Blink.rulesText: An ally teleports to a location it’s nearby. Draw a card.

Lightning Bolt.rulesText: Deal 3 damage to a random unit at target location.

Grapple Shot.rulesText: An ally shoots a projectile. If it hits a unit, the ally is dragged to that location, and may strike the hit unit.

Daperyll Vampire.rulesText:
Airborne

Damage dealt by Daperyll Vampire's strikes heals you.

Summoning Sphere.rulesText: You may summon minions to affected sites.

Phase Assassin.rulesText:
Voidwalk

Whenever Phase Assassin enters the void, he gains Stealth.

Root Spider.rulesText:
Burrowing

While Root Spider is burrowed, minions directly above it are disabled.

Highland Princess.rulesText: Genesis → Search your spellbook for an artifact that costs ① or less, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Shuffle.

Browse.rulesText: Look at your next seven spells. Put one in your hand and the rest on the bottom of your spellbook in any order.

Pudge Butcher.rulesText:
Immobile

Tap → Shoot a projectile. If it hits a unit, drag it to this location. Pudge may fight it.

Headless Haunt.rulesText:
Voidwalk

At the start of your turn, Headless Haunt teleports to the top of a random site or void.

Teleport.rulesText: Teleport an ally to the surface of target site.

Whirling Blades.rulesText: An ally may take up to two steps, and then strikes each enemy along their entire path.

Disenchant.rulesText: Destroy all auras and artifacts at target location up to two steps away.

Roaming Monster.rulesText: May be summoned to any site.

Fade.rulesText: Give an allied minion Stealth. If it occupies an enemy site, draw a card.

Zephyranne Airship.rulesText:
Airborne, Movement +2

May carry any number of allied minions.

Blood Ravens.rulesText:
Airborne

Damage dealt by Blood Ravens' strikes heals you.

Candlemas Monks.rulesText: Deathrite → Proceed to the end phase.

Grim Reaper.rulesText:
Lethal

Whenever Grim Reaper kills a minion, banish that minion and all copies. Search its owner's cemetery, hand, and spellbook and banish any copies. They shuffle.

Haast Eagle.rulesText:
Airborne

May carry a weaker allied minion.

Highland Falconer.rulesText: Genesis → You may search your hand and spellbook for a Beast with Airborne and mana cost ② or less and summon it here. Shuffle if needed.

Hounds of Ondaros.rulesText:
Airborne, Burrowing, Submerge, Voidwalk

Nearby enemies permanently lose Stealth.

Kite Archer.rulesText:
Ranged

Immediately after performing a ranged strike, Kite Archer may take a step.

Lord of the Void.rulesText:
Voidwalk

At the end of your turn, Lord of the Void may banish an adjacent site, unless there's an Avatar there.

Men of Leng.rulesText: Whenever Men of Leng strike an Avatar, that Avatar discards a random card.

Moon Clan Werewolf.rulesText: Sacrifice an allied Mortal → Summon Moon Clan Werewolf from your hand to the Mortal's location.

Nightmare.rulesText: At the end of your turn, for each enemy minion here, you may push it to an adjacent location or void.

Nimbus Jinn.rulesText:
Airborne

Discard a spell → Deal 3 damage to another random unit here.

Phantasmal Shade.rulesText: When Phantasmal Shade is struck, destroy it.

Phantom Steed.rulesText:
Movement +2, Voidwalk

May carry an allied minion.

Puppet Master.rulesText:
Airborne

Genesis → Gain control of all tapped minions here until Puppet Master leaves the realm.

Recurring Specter.rulesText:
Can't defend.

May be cast from your cemetery.

Riddle Sphinx.rulesText:
Airborne

Genesis → Look at your topmost spell. You may put it on the bottom of your spellbook, then an opponent may exchange your top and bottommost spells. Draw a card.

Skirmishers of Mu.rulesText:
Ranged

During basic movement, Skirmishers of Mu may perform a ranged strike from any location along their path.

Sky Baron.rulesText:
Airborne

All other minions lose Airborne.

Spire Lich.rulesText: If Spire Lich is atop a Tower, it has +2 power, Ranged, and Spellcaster.

Ultimate Horror.rulesText:
Airborne, Voidwalk

Genesis → Summon each other dead Voidwalk minion to a nearby site or void.

Vril Revenant.rulesText:
Voidwalk

① → Gain +1 power this turn.

Wind Sylph.rulesText:
Airborne, Air Spellcaster

After Wind Sylph casts a Magic spell, she may push a unit here one step.

Witherwing Hero.rulesText:
Airborne

Whenever a weaker allied minion here is attacked, you may return it to its owner's hand.

Chain Lightning.rulesText: Deal 2 damage to target unit nearby. Any number of times, you may spend ② to additionally target a new unit nearby the previous one.

Chaos Twister.rulesText: Place target minion on the back of your hand, then blow it off from a height of at least one foot. Deal damage equal to its power to each unit atop the site it lands on, including itself.

Dream-Quest.rulesText: An allied Spellcaster falls asleep and is disabled until hurt. At the start of your next turn, if it's still asleep, you may wake it up to search your spellbook for a card and put it into your hand. Shuffle if needed.

Flanking Maneuver.rulesText: Teleport any number of allies at one location to another location a chess knight's move away. Draw a card.

Mortality.rulesText: Kill all Mortal minions at target location up to two steps away.

Occult Ritual.rulesText: Gain (2) this turn for each allied Spellcaster nearby.

Psionic Blast.rulesText: Deal 1 damage to each minion here. They're disabled until your next turn.

Rain of Arrows.rulesText: Deal 1 damage to each aboveground minion.

Recall.rulesText: Teleport any number of allied minions to the caster’s location.

Telekinesis.rulesText: Caster snatches and picks up target nearby artifact they can carry.

Unlikely Alliance.rulesText: Draw a card for each rarity among allied minions.

Waypoint Portal.rulesText: Choose two different sites. This turn, units can move between them as if they were adjacent.

Windblast.rulesText: Push everything atop sites one step in a cardinal direction.

Evil Presence.rulesText: You may summon Spirits to affected sites. When you summon a Spirit here, give it Charge, and return Evil Presence to its owner's hand.

Thunderstorm.rulesText: At the end of your turn, deal 3 damage to a random unit atop affected sites, then you may move Thunderstorm one step. After it deals damage three times, dispel it.

Wall of Air.rulesText:
Conjure atop the border of a site you control.

Minions with Airborne or 2 or less power can't traverse Wall of Air.

Atlas Wanderers.rulesText: Genesis → This site and an adjacent site change places, carrying along everything of normal size.

Bone Rabble.rulesText: Whenever you play an earth site, you may summon Bone Rabble from your cemetery to that site.

Conqueror Worm.rulesText: At the end of your turn, if no enemy units occupy this site, permanently gain control of it.

Dwarven Digging Team.rulesText:
Burrowing

Allied minions occupying nearby sites have Burrowing.

Frontier Settlers.rulesText: Tap → Reveal the topmost site of your atlas. Play it adjacent to Frontier Settlers, if able, and they move there. They lose this ability.

Gneissgnath Gnomes.rulesText:
Burrowing

At the end of your turn, Gneissgnath Gnomes may burrow.

Grey Wolves.rulesText:
Your spellbook may include any number of Grey Wolves.

Has +1 power for each other Grey Wolves nearby.

King of the Realm.rulesText:
Other Mortals have +1 power.

You control all Mortals.

Mage Slayer.rulesText: Genesis → Kill target Spellcaster minion nearby.

Midland Army.rulesText:
Tap → Target a location up to three steps away. Deal 4 damage to each unit there.

Deathrite → Summon a Foot Soldier token to each adjacent location.

Monastery Gargoyle.rulesText: At the start and end of your turn, choose whether Monastery Gargoyle has Airborne or is a non-minion artifact.

Mordric Druids.rulesText:
Spellcaster

Whenever you lose life due to an undefended attack nearby, the attacker's controller also loses that much life.
